{{Quote|With Tanda the Hutt in our control, our operations will run more smoothly in this sector.|[[Urai Fen]]|<ref name="Forces" />}}
A '''skirmish''' on [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]] occurred when [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] forces decided to kidnap the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] spaceport director [[Tanda]] to corrupt Nal Hutta to further [[Tyber Zann]]'s plans. [[Urai Fen]] and some [[Defiler]]s landed on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] and fought their way past various Hutt forces. They located Tanda on a landing pad and destroyed the [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|shield generator]] there. Shortly afterwards, a [[TZ-15 shuttle|Consortium shuttle]] arrived and took [[Tanda]], making the mission a success.

{{Battle-stub}}
